title: a random animations pack
description: This modpack adds some cool animations to the game.
body:
# ![LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/edc91d9a3c9fb8fbb53f7f629de4d7ee7c13c369.png)
Hello! This is a modpack to give Minecraft some animations and will get updates sometimes. And you, yes you, can help by submitting mods or reporting bugs by clicking [here](https://forms.gle/HANXLyzaQj69De1E9)

Texture Packs
1. A Good Place Sample  
2. Fresh Animations  

Mods
1. Architecturey API  
2. Explosive Enhancement  
3. Fabric API  
4. Fancy Block Particles - Renewed  
5. Immersive UI  
6. Konkrete  
7. Melody  
8. Mod Menu  
9. Not Enough Animations  
10. OctoLib  
11. Smooth Scrolling  
12. Text Placeholder API  
13. Wakes  
14. [EMF] Entity Model Features  
15. [ETF] Entity Texture Features
